description.initial: You descend into the personal archives of Nerina, an ancient mermaid scholar who has lived for centuries beneath the waves. The chamber is filled with scrolls preserved in waterproof cases, tablets of coral carved with ancient texts, and glowing jellyfish that provide gentle illumination. Nerina herself floats among her treasures, her silver hair drifting like seaweed, her ancient eyes filled with curiosity and sorrow as she hears of your father.
description.return: Nerina's Archives. The ancient scholar continues her eternal work of preserving knowledge.
description.atmospheric: The water here is perfectly still, preserving these treasures for eternity. Knowledge floats all around you.

npcs.dialogue: "A surface dweller, breathing beneath the waves. You must carry one of Kira's crystals. That means you are a seeker. Many have passed through these waters chasing the Island of Bliss. We merfolk have watched them come and go for centuries. We cannot follow them, the surface would kill us just as the deep would kill you without that crystal. If you truly wish to find the island, you must speak with the Pearl Guardian in his chamber far to the south. He is the only one who knows the way. But he will not speak to just anyone. You must first prove yourself by finding the three relics that past seekers left behind in these waters. One lies in the Coral Garden to the southeast, one in the Oyster Beds further south, and one among the Ancient Ruins at the eastern edge. Bring all three to the Guardian, and he will decide if you are worthy of the knowledge you seek."

dialogueConditions.text: "The Guardian has judged you worthy. Not many earn that. Whatever he has told you, trust it. Safe travels on the surface, seeker. I hope you find what you are looking for."

interactables.name: Preserved Scrolls
interactables.examineText: Scrolls from civilizations long forgotten, preserved perfectly in their waterproof cases. Nerina has collected knowledge for centuries.
interactables.interactionText: You browse the scrolls with Nerina's permission. One speaks of the Island of Bliss: 'Beyond the western waters, where perfection awaits. Those who reach its shores find peace beyond measure, a paradise where all suffering ends and joy is eternal.'

interactables.name: Lantern Jellyfish
interactables.examineText: Bioluminescent jellyfish drift through the chamber, providing soft, ever-shifting light. They seem tame, perhaps bred over centuries for this purpose.
